mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO allocate (supermarket_Id, warehouse_Id, commodity_Id, allocate_Amount) VALUES
(#{item.supermarketId}, #{item.warehouseId}, #{item.commodityId}, #{item.allocateAmount})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE allocate_Amount = VALUES(allocate_Amount)
mapper.select: SELECT supermarket_Id, warehouse_Id, commodity_Id, allocate_Amount FROM allocate
SELECT supermarket_Id, warehouse_Id, commodity_Id, allocate_Amount FROM allocate WHERE warehouse_Id = #{warehouseId}
SELECT supermarket_Id, warehouse_Id, commodity_Id, allocate_Amount FROM allocate WHERE supermarket_Id = #{supermarketId}
